Contains.Name: SAP GUI
Contains.Description: SAP Graphical Front End with starter application SAP Logon Pad. The user can only display preconfigured connection information for SAP systems provided by the administrator (see manual for details).

Contains.Name: SAP Logon
Contains.Description: Extended starter application SAP Logon with Desktop and Start menu Shortcuts. The user can display and modify connection information for SAP systems.

Contains.Name: SAP GUI Scripting
Contains.Description: SAP GUI Scripting Interface

Contains.Name: GUI XT
Contains.Description: GUI Extensions for client side customizing of SAP Dynpro screens

Contains.Name: SAP Web Dynpro Rich Client
Contains.Description: SAP Web Dynpro Rich Client is a graphical user interface intended for displaying Web Dynpro applications. Since Web Dynpro is based on a new programming model it is not possible to use SAP GUI for Windows to display these applications. The integrated Web Dynpro Client provides a solution to this problem.

Contains.Name: Shortcut to SAPlpd
Contains.Description: Routing program for print output on Windows PCs. SAPlpd is addressed via a network connection or locally via SAP GUI. If used via network connection, PC must have a fixed IP address, and SAPlpd must be started manually before printing.

Contains.Name: SAP GUI Suite
Contains.Description: SAP GUI and related components

Contains.Name: R/3 Add-On
Contains.Description: Front-End Add-On for SAP R/3 Enterprise. This package contains application extensions needed for some R/3 transactions. Please ask your SAP system administrator for details.

Contains.Name: General Add-On
Contains.Description: Front-End Add-On that can be used to extend functionality of SAP systems and that are not restricted to one SAP Component (R/3, BW, APO, CRM, SEM, KW, EP, ...)

Contains.Name: Development Tools
Contains.Description: Collection of Tools for Development

Contains.Name: Legacy Components
Contains.Description: Components for the usage with older SAP releases (R/3 4.6 and lower) and/or old Office products (Excel 95, ...). These components will only be needed, if you intend to use this version of SAP GUI for Windows with your old SAP installations.

Contains.Name: SCM Add-On
Contains.Description: Front-End Add-On of SAP Supply Chain Management (SCM)

Contains.Name: CRM Add-On
Contains.Description: Front-End Add-On of SAP Customer Relationship Management (CRM)

Contains.Name: SEM Add-On
Contains.Description: Front-End Add-On for SAP Strategic Enterprise Management (SEM)

Contains.Name: BW Add-On
Contains.Description: Front-End Add-On for SAP Business Information Warehouse (BW)

Contains.Name: KW Add-On
Contains.Description: Front-End Add-On of SAP's Knowledge Management solution that includes all SAP training courses and all SAP documentation.

Contains.Name: SAP GUI
Contains.Description: SAP Graphical Front End with starter application SAP Logon Pad. The user can only display preconfigured connection information for SAP systems provided by the administrator (see manual for details).

Contains.Name: SAP Logon
Contains.Description: Extended starter application SAP Logon with Desktop and Start menu Shortcuts. The user can display and modify connection information for SAP systems.

Contains.Name: SCM Add-On
Contains.Description: Front-End Add-On of SAP Supply Chain Management (SCM)

Contains.Name: CRM Add-On
Contains.Description: Front-End Add-On of SAP Customer Relationship Management (CRM)

Contains.Name: SEM Add-On
Contains.Description: Front-End Add-On for SAP Strategic Enterprise Management (SEM)
